## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Validation

List how this change was validated (tests, local runs, screenshots, logs).

## Quality Gates

- [ ] Khawi CI is passing for this PR
- [ ] Markdown QA is passing for docs/script/workflow changes
- [ ] New or changed behavior is covered by tests where applicable
- [ ] Relevant documentation has been updated

## Risk & Rollback

Describe potential risk and a rollback plan if needed.
